content.json: # TrustM365 Monthly Drift Telemetry\nThis workbook summarizes drift and remediation telemetry exported from TrustM365.

content.query:
let tableName = 'TrustM365Drift_CL';
union isfuzzy=true table(tableName)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where eventType_s in ('drift.check.completed', 'drift.post_restore.completed')
| summarize DriftCount=sum(toint(driftCount_d)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Daily Drift Volume (30 days)

content.query:
let tableName = 'TrustM365Drift_CL';
union isfuzzy=true table(tableName)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where eventType_s == 'drift.check.completed' and status_s == 'drifted'
| summarize DriftChecks=count(), TotalDrift=sum(toint(driftCount_d)) by tenantId_s
| order by TotalDrift desc
content.title: Tenants With Most Drift (30 days)

content.query:
let tableName = 'TrustM365Drift_CL';
union isfuzzy=true table(tableName)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where eventType_s == 'drift.check.completed' and status_s == 'drifted'
| summarize DriftChecks=count(), TotalDrift=sum(toint(driftCount_d)) by areaKey_s
| order by TotalDrift desc
content.title: Top Drifted Areas

content.query:
let tableName = 'TrustM365Restore_CL';
union isfuzzy=true table(tableName)
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize Success=countif(eventType_s in ('restore.property.succeeded','restore.resource.succeeded')), Failure=countif(eventType_s in ('restore.property.failed','restore.resource.failed')) by tenantId_s
| extend SuccessRatePct = iif((Success + Failure) == 0, 100.0, todouble(Success) * 100.0 / todouble(Success + Failure))
| order by SuccessRatePct asc
content.title: Remediation Success Rate
